You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr. Sunita Varma is Professor in the Department of Computer Engineering. Her Research interest includes Cloud Computing, Big Data Analysis. Dr. Sunita Varma is working as a Professor and Head in Department of Information Technology from Feb. 2017. Her research area is Cloud Computing, Big Data Analytics and related areas. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1 Ph.D. Computer Engg. 2013 DAVV 2 M.E. Shri Vaishnav Institute of Technology and Science, Indore 1998 to 2005 4. Lecturer Deptt. of MCA IPS, Indore 1995 to 1998 5. Design Engg. R & D. Deptt P & P Computers 1993 to 1995 Research Details: Dr. Sunita varma is working in cloud computing, Big Data analytics, Internet of Things and related areas She has guided several BE, ME and MCA projects She is always interested in learning and working in evolving Digital Technologies She published good number of research papers in reputed Journals and Conferences PhD Supervision: S.No. Name of Student Title of Research Year of completion 1 Mr. Yunus Khan Development and Implementation of Evidence Collection Strategy for Cloud Forensic ongoing 2 Ms. Namrata Bhatt Framework of IOT in Agriculture Field for Enhancing Production of Crop ongoing 3 Ms. Megha Kuliha Analysis & Development of a secure IoT System using Blockchain Technology ongoing 4 Ms. Shardha Soni A study of shilling Attacks on Multi-criteria Collaborative filtering in Recommender system ongoing 5 Mr. Vivek Menon Design and development of Resource Management Algorithms for Fog Computing ongoing 6 Mr. Veerendra Shirivastav Design and Development of Integrated Security Testbed Framework for Vulnerability Assessment in IoT Environment ongoing 7 Ms. Shardha Kumar Investigation in Proteomics using Deep Learning ongoing 8 Mr. Prveen Singh Thakur NA ongoing S.No Name of Student Title of Research Year of completion 1 Ms. Varshali Jaiswal Development and Implementation of A Novel Algorithm for Image Segmentation using Artificial Intelligence and Evolutionary Approach ongoing 2 Ms. Puja gupta Design of Colour Image Recognition Framework Based on Machine Learning Techniques ongoing 3 Ms. Deepika Jain ongoing 4 Mr. Ashish Sharma Performance Improvement By Dynamic Load Balancing In SDN Data Centers ongoing 5 Ms. Purva Shukla The study of intelligent transportation system for smart vehicles in VANET ongoing Publications: International Journals S. She is Incharge of Institute Website and has successfully carried out various responsibilities in Examination, Academics and on Department Level. Her area of research includes Soft Computing, Machine Learning, Theory of Computation and Software Engineering. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1. Guided various research based projects to BE, ME and MCA students. Actively involved in doing research since 2007. Completed PhD in Computer Engineering and published various research papers in the renowed journals and conferences. Developed software for designing duty chart for exams for examination section. A dedicated, result oriented candidate with 6 months experience as software developer in Innoeye (eye for Innovation) pvt. Ltd in indore and working experience on java and angularjs in 2016
